next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/vikunja-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record for the hostname in vikunja.public_url.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to the CT upstream (http://<ct-ip>:3456); enable WebSockets.
Register the first Vikunja account in the web UI (no pre-seeded admin).
Keep HDC_VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD backed up — losing it makes the Postgres volume unrecoverable.
